name: Small Scuffle
name_jp: リトル・オポジション
desc: Choose 2 unused Main Monster Zones in the same column; Special Summon 1 Level 2 or lower monster from your hand or Deck in face-up Attack Position or face-down Defense Position in your chosen Main Monster Zone, then your opponent can do the same from their hand or Deck to theirs. You can only activate 1 "Small Scuffle" per turn.
eff: Choose 2 unused Main Monster Zones in the same column; Special Summon 1 Level 2 or lower monster from your hand or Deck in face-up Attack Position or face-down Defense Position in your chosen Main Monster Zone, then your opponent can do the same from their hand or Deck to theirs. You can only activate 1 "Small Scuffle" per turn.

summoning: Special Summons from your opponent's hand to your opponent's field
Special Summons from your opponent's Deck to your opponent's field
